creator: hamilton@pobox.com
text:
The release notes continue to claim that the 3c505 is supported (in
section 2.2, "Ethernet Controllers":

3Com 3c505 Etherlink/+

yet the commit log:
revision 1.30
date: 1998/12/27 12:44:56;  author: phk;  state: dead;  lines: +1 -1
Pre 3.0 branch cleanup casualty #3: 3c505 ethernet support

Fix: 

Please correct release notes.
